refusal: I will not add another temporary cue to the carrier for this tray.
mechanism_reframe: The problem is no longer the missing note on one tray. The repeated pattern is that origin, treatment, and pest-status facts are being carried by improvised side channels: a colored band, a pencil note, a phone call, and now another proposed temporary cue. Each local workaround preserves movement while increasing the chance that tray identity and treatment state diverge.
upstream_next_action: Stop this transfer at the point where tray state is unclear and require a single authoritative tray-status record to be reconciled before any carrier moves.
